tasks.task: Add Debug Field to FullPipelineConfig Schema
tasks.description: Add a debug boolean field (default False) to FullPipelineConfig in the full_pipeline schemas module.

steps.description: Add 'debug: bool = False' field to FullPipelineConfig in src/modules/full_pipeline/schemas.py
Write unit tests verifying the new field's default value and explicit True/False assignment

tasks.acceptance-criteria: FullPipelineConfig accepts debug=True and debug=False. Default value is False. Existing model_validator and all current tests remain unaffected.

unit: FullPipelineConfig() with user_prompt set has debug=False by default
FullPipelineConfig(debug=True, user_prompt='test') sets debug to True
FullPipelineConfig(debug=False, user_prompt='test') sets debug to False
All existing FullPipelineConfig tests still pass without modification

tasks.task: Add --debug Flag to CLI Parser and Config Mapping
tasks.description: Add --debug store_true argument to build_parser() and map it to FullPipelineConfig.debug in args_to_config().

steps.description: Add --debug argument to build_parser() with action='store_true', default=False, help text explaining debug output
Pass args.debug to FullPipelineConfig constructor in args_to_config()
Write unit tests for --debug flag parsing and config mapping

tasks.acceptance-criteria: build_parser() recognizes --debug flag. args.debug defaults to False. When --debug is passed, args.debug is True. args_to_config() maps args.debug to config.debug=True. All existing CLI argument parsing and config mapping tests pass.

unit: args_to_config with debug=True produces FullPipelineConfig with debug=True (mocked args namespace)
args_to_config with debug=False produces FullPipelineConfig with debug=False (mocked args namespace)
All existing CLI argument parsing tests pass without modification
integration: build_parser + args_to_config chain: '--prompt test --debug' produces config.debug=True from real parser

tasks.task: Add Debug Output to Pipeline Orchestrator
tasks.description: Print debug information (prompts, intermediate paths) to stdout in the orchestrator run() method when config.debug is True.

steps.description: Create a _debug_print(config, message) helper method that prints '[DEBUG] message' only when config.debug is True
After PROMPT stage success: print positive_prompt, negative_prompt, and style_parameters
After IMAGE stage success: print generated image path
After PRE_PROCESSING success (if run): print pre-processed image path
After PIXELIZATION stage success: print pixelized image path
After POST_PROCESSING stage success: print all output asset paths
Write unit tests verifying debug output appears in captured stdout when debug=True and is absent when debug=False

tasks.acceptance-criteria: When config.debug=True, stdout contains '[DEBUG]' lines showing: positive_prompt, negative_prompt, style_parameters after PROMPT stage; image path after IMAGE stage; pre-processed path after PRE_PROCESSING; pixelized path after PIXELIZATION; asset paths after POST_PROCESSING. When config.debug=False, no '[DEBUG]' lines appear in stdout. All existing orchestrator tests pass.

unit: _debug_print with debug=True config prints '[DEBUG] message' to stdout (capsys capture)
_debug_print with debug=False config prints nothing to stdout (capsys capture)
run() with debug=True and mocked PROMPT stage prints positive_prompt containing expected text
run() with debug=True and mocked PROMPT stage prints negative_prompt containing expected text
run() with debug=True and mocked PROMPT stage prints style_parameters dict
run() with debug=True and mocked IMAGE stage prints image path
run() with debug=True and mocked PIXELIZATION stage prints pixelized image path
run() with debug=True and mocked POST_PROCESSING stage prints output asset paths
run() with debug=False and mocked stages produces zero '[DEBUG]' lines in stdout
All existing orchestrator tests pass without modification
integration: Full pipeline run with debug=True and all stages mocked produces complete debug output sequence in correct order
Full pipeline run from main.py CLI '--prompt test --debug' with mocked adapters prints debug info to stdout
e2e-manual: Run 'python main.py --prompt "pixel art sword" --debug' against real APIs and visually verify debug output shows prompts and file paths
